mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_token_usage_log (call_time, module_key, model_name, agent_id, scene_id, skill_id, tokens_input, tokens_output, duration_ms, cost_yuan, status, error_message, created_at) VALUES (#{callTime}, #{moduleKey}, #{modelName}, #{agentId}, #{sceneId}, #{skillId}, #{tokensInput}, #{tokensOutput}, #{durationMs}, #{costYuan}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, NOW())
